summary: The team discussed building an interactive restaurant app where customers vote on menu items to optimize offerings. Key focus areas included a simple voting system, lightweight authentication, and a dual interface for customers and staff. Data analytics will drive menu decisions and inventory optimization. UX simplicity and scalability were emphasized. Next steps involve consolidating requirements.

details: App allows customers to vote or rate menu items.
Menu evolves based on popularity and performance.
Goal is to refine offerings and reduce waste.
Options discussed: thumbs up/down, star ratings, or reactions.
Must be simple and require minimal user effort (1–2 taps).
Lightweight login (e.g., Google/Apple sign-in) preferred.
Anonymous voting risks unreliable or spam data.
Track ratings over time to identify trends and demand.
Analytics to include top/low-performing dishes and voting trends.
Potential for predictive demand and inventory optimization.
Alerts for consistently underperforming dishes.
Link dish ratings to ingredient usage.
Enable recommendations for stock levels.
Requires backend tracking of ingredients per dish.
Dual interface: customer-facing app and internal staff dashboard.
Customers see menu and ratings only.
Staff access includes ingredients, inventory, and analytics.
Focus on clean, fast, mobile-friendly design.
Customer app sections: Home/About, Menu, Contact, Location.
Encourage voting through subtle prompts.
Optional notifications considered for future phase.
Backend should support future expansion.
Strong data tracking required from the start.

decisions: Implement a simple and fast voting mechanism.
Use lightweight authentication instead of anonymous voting.
Design a dual interface separating customer and staff functionalities.
Restrict ingredient visibility to staff only.
Prioritize analytics to guide menu and inventory decisions.

action_items.task: Consolidate discussion into initial product requirements
Define technical approach for authentication and backend scalability
Outline data tracking and analytics framework
Design initial UX/UI concepts for customer app
Explore inventory integration with ingredient tracking
Define strategies to encourage user voting

open_questions.question: Which voting format will be selected (thumbs, stars, or reactions)?
What level of authentication detail is required to balance usability and data reliability?
How will ingredient-to-dish mapping be implemented in the backend?
What specific methods will be used to encourage user engagement in voting?
Will notifications be included in the initial version or deferred to a later phase?
